title: Generating a Summary of a Conversational Dialogue
scenario: Write a prompt that generates a summary of a conversational dialogue with multiple turns, where each turn has its own speaker and text. The dialogue is represented as a list of dictionaries.
constraints: Must include a summary of each speaker's contributions

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the generated summary adhere to the constraints of being under 250 words and including a summary of each speaker's contributions?
Does the generated summary correctly capture the main points and contributions of each speaker?
Is the generated summary readable and well-formatted?
